emails.subject: Re: deal 555159
emails.body: Re: deal 555159 Tom's in a meeting, but in his trade log he has APS crossed out and over it he's written Pinnacle. So I'm going to wait to find out what happened. I'll let you know. Kate Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 03/20/2001 12:46 PM

emails.subject: deal 555159
emails.body: Tom Alonso deal 555159 Bloomberg shows cp as Arizona Public Service....we have Pinnacle West. From my understanding from Rhonda trades can still be done under APS or Pinncale West. Please tell him to clarify which cp with the broker as the trade is being done. Thanks!!
